ai_summary: J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the receipt of the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) certified order sanctioning its amalgamation with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited. This marks a material step towards the finalization of the merger, indicating that J.B. Chemicals will be absorbed by Torrent Pharmaceuticals, significantly altering its corporate structure. No red flags are present, as this is a routine regulatory disclosure confirming judicial approval for the corporate action.
